word: G2146 - εὐπροσωπέω - euprosōpéō - yoo-pros-o-peh'-o - Make a fair show

sections.paragraph:
- Original: εὐπροσωπέω

- Transliteration: Euprosopeo

- Phonetic: yoo-pros-o-peh'-o

- Definition:

1. to make a fair show

2. to please

- Origin: from a compound of G2095 and G4383

- TDNT entry: 19:00,0

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From a compound of G2095 and G4383; to be of good countenance that is (figuratively) to make a display: - make a fair show.
